labacts.name: Division Algorithm
labacts.description: Computes the quotient and remainder for two integers using the division algorithm.

labacts.name: Euclidean
labacts.description: Finds the greatest common divisor of two positive integers using the Euclidean algorithm.

labacts.name: Collatz Sequence
labacts.description: Generates the Collatz sequence for a positive odd integer greater than 0.

labacts.name: Fibonacci
labacts.description: Generates the Fibonacci sequence for a given number of terms greater than 2, starting with F₀ = 0 and F₁ = 1.

labacts.name: Lucas
labacts.description: Generates the Lucas sequence for a given number of terms greater than 2, starting with L₀ = 2 and L₁ = 1.

labacts.name: Tribonacci
labacts.description: Generates the Tribonacci sequence for a given number of terms greater than 3, starting with T₀ = 0, T₁ = 0, and T₂ = 1.

labacts.name: Palindrome
labacts.description: Checks if a given string is a palindrome.

inputs.label: Enter String
inputs.placeholder: e.g. racecar or never odd or even
